versions.content: The main scheme is a card type. It represents the villain's primary objective. If the amount of threat on a main scheme is equal to or greater than its target threat value, the scheme advances. If the final stage of the main scheme is completed, the villain wins the game.

Minion is an encounter card type. When a minion is revealed, it enters play engaged with the player who revealed it. Minions activate against the player they are engaged with during the villain phase.

During setup, after drawing their starting hand, each player has a single opportunity to take a mulligan. To do so, a player discards any number of cards from their hand, and then draws up to their starting hand size.
